description: Vault of high-intensity procedural seeds and events, bound to sensitive region history. Instances only; schemas live in HorrorPlace-Constellation-Contracts.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: This vault may contain explicit horror narratives, subject to Dead-Ledger and internal governance.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All seed, event, and policy artifacts must include a valid schemaRef pointing to an approved schema in this repo or HorrorPlace-Constellation-Contracts.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: All artifacts must include explicit routing metadata (objectKind, tier, targetRepo, targetPath, schemaRef, and registry bindings).

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: All authoring requests that produce seedContractCard, eventContract, or policyContractCard for this repo must resolve routes through the routing spine.

authoringHints.summary: T2-vault content repo for high-intensity seeds, events, and related policy envelopes. Schemas are defined upstream; instances live here under strict governance.
aiBehavior: Only generate seedContractCard, eventContract, or policyContractCard instances in this repo.
Always verify schemaRef is one of the whitelisted contract schemas before generating artifacts.
Route Tier-2 seedContractCard and eventContract requests to this repo only when routingSpineRef resolves here.
Ensure all seeds reference valid regionContractCard and personaContractCard IDs, not raw narrative blocks.
Treat every artifact as subject to Dead-Ledger and internal review; avoid generating public-facing examples here.
